category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates CycloneDX SBOMs from Go modules; official GitHub README says cyclonedx-gomod creates CycloneDX Software Bill of Materials from Go modules.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cyclonedx-gomod; official GitHub repository title and README use cyclonedx-gomod.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains CLI usage; official CycloneDX site hosts specification documentation referenced by the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/CycloneDX/cyclonedx-gomod, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub README describes Go-module SBOM generation and CycloneDX output.
